This is a testharness.js-based test.

  assert_equals: expected "img loaded" but got "img not loaded"
[FAIL] U+000B VT    should not be parsed between directive name and value - HTTP header
  assert_equals: expected "img loaded" but got "img not loaded"
[FAIL] U+000B VT    should not be parsed inside directive value - meta tag
  assert_equals: expected "img loaded" but got "img not loaded"
[FAIL] U+000B VT    should not be parsed inside directive value - HTTP header
  assert_equals: expected "img loaded" but got "img not loaded"
